divergence: The postal service achieved faster-than-light delivery but only for junk mail
story_angle: human-interest profile of the one person unaffected by the great event and deeply annoyed about it
headline: Inexplicably Empty Postbox of Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur Sparks Space-Time Outrage
deck: As interstellar circulars arrive at warp speeds, one man finds himself tragically unannounced.
article:
In a scandal most grievous, Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur of Quoia's notorious Absentee Postbox has taken it upon himself to voice vigorously his dissatisfaction with the recent implementation of Faster-Than-Light (FTL) delivery—currently only benefiting those enshrouded in the nebulous waves of junk mail. Whilst his neighbors exuberantly wade through daily drifts of cosmic pamphlets weighing in excess of three tons, the vicomte's solitary postbox languishes in ignominious silence—a woeful void adorned solely by the ghostly echoes of his forlorn aspirations.

Each dawn, as the horse-drawn delivery cart ambles forth, Vicomte LeFacteur's gill-lines flush indigo—an aesthetic plight indicative of shallow waters yet deep resentment—upon receiving but a single letter, which, he laments, hardly constitutes sufficient justification for his existence in this brave new cosmos. "It is an affront unparalleled!" he bellowed from the heights of his eight-foot doorway, "for I have thrice petitioned the esteemed Postmaster-General for inclusion under the new junk tariff, citing 'equal exposure to nebulous nuisances'!" Thus far, these appeals have been met with silence, like his postbox.

The Postmaster-General remains steadfast, asserting that the issuance of random circulars constitutes a transformative frontier that merely bypasses the vicomte's abode for reasons unspecified. As others excavate their yards under the weight of intergalactic nonsense, the vicomte finds himself locked in a bureaucratic limbo, with an empty postbox as his only companion in a universe that seems intent on abandoning him to his petty rage.

While the cosmos continues spewing its detritus at unparalleled speeds, the vicomte twiddles his thumbs in an ever-expanding void, desperately clinging to the notion that perhaps one day his letterbox may also become a conduit for the universe's trashy treasures.
author: Gustave P. Chiffon, Chief Correspondent of Quoian Communications

weather.condition: Vicomte Void Ripples Outward, Mail Eclipse Persists

oped.title: An Empty Postbox? A Triumph of Discernment!
oped.author: Sir Reginald Fussbudget, Chairman of the Society for the Preservation of Slow Post
oped.body: The outcry over Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur’s vacant receptacle is nothing short of hysterical. In this enlightened 1881, one must applaud the postal authorities for restricting their miraculous warp delivery solely to those essential circulars advertising patent corsets and miracle hair tonics. Proper correspondence, after all, requires weeks of thoughtful delay lest it arrive before the sender has properly forgotten its contents. The Vicomte’s emptiness is surely his own fault; had he worn a more commanding stovepipe hat instead of that flimsy bowler, the interstellar flyers would have found him irresistible. I, for one, receive dozens weekly and consider it my civic duty to recycle them promptly into kindling. Any demand for faster genuine letters risks flooding decent households with unwelcome invitations. Better an empty box than an overfull one, I say.

classifieds.text: Wanted: fleet-footed sorter of distinction to remedy the Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur’s lamentably vacant postbox; must outpace light itself and furnish circulars by noon tomorrow or forfeit wages.
For sale at once: entire stock of unopened interstellar pamphlets, their warp delivery assured yet useless to the undersigned, whose own box remains a void of cosmic shame.
Lost: one gentleman’s reputation for prompt announcements, last seen inside an empty postbox belonging to Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur; handsome reward for its swift restoration.
The Galactic Junk Mail Syndicate tenders its most abject apologies to Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur for the present emptiness of his receptacle, pledging immediate FTL redress or dissolution of the firm.

panels.caption: Vicomte LeFacteur rattles his empty brass slot. 'Not one blasted nebula circular?'
The Postmaster adjusts his goggles: 'FTL applies solely to unsolicited matter, my lord. Your box failed the cosmic audit.'
'Impossible! I subscribed to the void registry!' 'We blacklisted you for insufficient junk enthusiasm.'

joke.setup: Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur, confronted with an empty postbox after the service began hurtling circulars faster than light,
joke.punchline: concluded his creditors had achieved what Parliament never could: collecting debts from a man who had not yet been born.
joke.text: Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur, confronted with an empty postbox after the service began hurtling circulars faster than light, concluded his creditors had achieved what Parliament never could: collecting debts from a man who had not yet been born.

sponsor_ads.headline: Cure for the Vicomte's Void
sponsor_ads.body: Procure our galvanic postbox simulators, which emit convincing facsimiles of interstellar circulars at a stately earthly pace to spare gentlefolk the indignity of an empty receptacle.

sponsor_ads.headline: LeFacteur Redress & Outrage Tonic
sponsor_ads.body: A single draught of this ether-distilled cordial will calm space-time fury arising from absent FTL detritus, restoring Victorian composure while the stars catch up.
sponsor_ads.tagline: May cause premature arrival of yesterday's bills.

sponsor_ads.headline: Junk Mail Containment Apparatus
sponsor_ads.body: Install our patented lead-lined letter boxes to trap any rogue faster-than-light pamphlets before they can vanish and provoke further cosmic indignation among the nobility.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Unsuitable for those who value prompt delivery.

sponsor_ads.headline: Commissioned Stellar Circulars
sponsor_ads.body: Order bespoke advertisements guaranteed to outrun ordinary post yet deliberately omit your own box, thereby turning the Vicomte's misfortune into profitable exclusivity.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Printed on paper that has not yet been invented.

stories.headline: Temporal Mail Engineers Baffled by Selective Delivery Failure at Sorting Estate
stories.deck: Wormhole generators suspected of harbouring personal grudge against vicomte
stories.article:
The Quoian Academy of Faster-Than-Light Dispatch has dispatched a team of chronal physicists to the estate of Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur following reports of zero interstellar circulars arriving despite universal saturation of the Cobalt Halo. Initial readings indicate the household's postbox maintains standard spatial integrity with no detectable chronometric interference.

Further examination reveals that the vicomte's complete lack of prior subscriptions to nebula sweepstakes and galactic patent registries may be inhibiting the automated FTL routing protocols, which rely on established recipient profiles for warp targeting.

real_world_echo: New EU border system tripling time at passport control mirrored in the tripling of ordinary mail latency for the one household still on non-FTL routes
